def generate_signals(df, params):
    import pandas as pd
    import numpy as np
    import ta
    rsi_period = params['rsi_period']
    atr_period = params['atr_period']
    breakout_multiplier = params['breakout_multiplier']
    df['rsi'] = ta.momentum.rsi(df['close'], window=rsi_period)
    df['atr'] = ta.volatility.AverageTrueRange(df['high'], df['low'], df['close'], window=atr_period).average_true_range()
    df['upper_band'] = df['high'].rolling(window=atr_period).max() + breakout_multiplier * df['atr']
    df['lower_band'] = df['low'].rolling(window=atr_period).min() - breakout_multiplier * df['atr']
    signals = pd.Series(0, index=df.index)
    signals[(df['close'] > df['upper_band']) & (df['rsi'] > 50)] = 1
    signals[(df['close'] < df['lower_band']) & (df['rsi'] < 50)] = -1
    return signals.astype(int)
rationale: GBP/USD exhibits momentum breakout behavior when price breaches volatility-adjusted bands confirmed by RSI trend direction.
